mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.salary_no AS salaryNo, s.user_id AS userId, s.dept_id AS deptId, s.salary_month AS yearMonth, s.status, s.base_salary AS baseSalary, s.position_salary AS positionSalary, s.performance_salary AS performanceSalary, s.overtime_salary AS overtimeSalary, s.bonus, s.subsidy, s.other_addition AS otherAddition, s.social_insurance AS socialInsurance, s.personal_tax AS personalTax, s.late_fine AS lateFine, s.other_deduction AS otherDeduction, s.gross_salary AS grossSalary, s.net_salary AS netSalary, s.creator_id AS creatorId, s.approver_id AS approverId, s.approve_time AS approveTime, s.approve_comment AS approveComment, s.paid_time AS paidTime, s.create_time AS createTime, s.update_time AS updateTime FROM oa_salary s WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oa_salary WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND salary_month = #{yearMonth}
SELECT salary_no FROM oa_salary WHERE salary_no LIKE #{prefix} ORDER BY salary_no DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO oa_salary (salary_no, user_id, dept_id, salary_month, status, base_salary, position_salary, performance_salary, overtime_salary, bonus, subsidy, other_addition, social_insurance, personal_tax, late_fine, other_deduction, gross_salary, net_salary, employee_count, creator_id, approver_id, approve_comment, paid_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.salaryNo}, #{item.userId}, #{item.deptId}, #{item.salaryMonth}, #{item.status}, #{item.baseSalary}, #{item.positionSalary}, #{item.performanceSalary}, #{item.overtimeSalary}, #{item.bonus}, #{item.subsidy}, #{item.otherAddition}, #{item.socialInsurance}, #{item.personalTax}, #{item.lateFine}, #{item.otherDeduction}, #{item.totalGrossSalary}, #{item.totalNetSalary}, #{item.employeeCount}, #{item.creatorId}, #{item.approverId}, #{item.approveComment}, #{item.paidTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
